blocks.text: ♟️ Thu 18:45 — Carlsen opens Grenke Chess Freestyle in Karlsruhe, engine prep forbidden
Barça lead Real Madrid by 4 points — Saturday's trip to the Metropolitano shapes the title race, then Madrid host Bayern in the Champions League quarterfinal Tuesday. A week that decides everything.
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest opens; rain (Nygaard) carries Norwegian colours
